PATIENT_ID: TEST_DELIRIUM_CONSULT_001
ARRIVAL_TIME: 2026-01-15 08:00:00

[CONSULT_NOTE] 2026-01-17 22:34:00
Geriatric Trauma Screen:
Delirium screen: Patient is at risk for delirium given acute trauma,
unfamiliar surroundings, pain, metabolic derangements.
At risk for delirium.
Counseled to best prevent hospital delirium, no sleeping during the day.
